WebLink.url: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query={!IF(OR(IsBlank(Account.GeolocationLatitude__c),IsBlank(Account.GeolocationLongitude__c),Account.GeolocationLatitude__c=="0",Account.GeolocationLongitude__c=="0"), IF(IsBlank(Account.BillingStreet), "", Account.BillingStreet + "+") + IF(IsBlank(Account.BillingCity), "", Account.BillingCity + "+") + Account.BillingCountry, Account.GeolocationLatitude__c + "," + Account.GeolocationLongitude__c)}
